name: Reign & Vis
bio: They met in darkness and walked through flame together. Reign, once a broken warrior haunted by failure. Vis, the poison witch from the Marshlands, a survivor who learned long ago that cruelty often wears crowns.

What began as alliance became something far deeper. Reign fought with honor. Vis with cunning. He held the line. She cut through it. Where he offered hope, she offered reality. Together, they became unstoppable—not because they shared the same approach, but because they trusted each other implicitly.

Through countless battles—against Drexl, Zornath, Malakar, and the demons of their own pasts—they grew inseparable. And when the world was nearly lost, it was Vis who stood by Reign, hand on his shoulder, reminding him that this time… he didn't have to face it alone.

In the years that followed, they would shape a new Valkorath—not through domination, but through healing. And from that bond, came Fredric, their son—proof that even in a world shaped by death and shadow, love could still rise from the ashes.
